name: Thick Potato Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 large potatoes, cut into bite-size pieces
Enough water to cover the potatoes
Milk or cream or half and half
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potato pieces and chopped onions in enough water to cover until tender.
2. Make a thick white sauce using butter, flour, dried chicken broth powder, salt, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Gradually add hot milk, cream, or half and half to achieve desired consistency. Adjust seasonings as needed.
4. Add the cooked potatoes and onions to the sauce without draining them first.
5. Adjust thickness to suit preference.
Note: Amounts may vary depending on quantity of ingredients and number of servings.
